description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a spacious layout and extensive outdoor amenities. The front features a double garage, a driveway with two parked cars, and a small landscaped area with trees. The rear of the house opens onto a large wooden deck that includes a swimming pool, multiple seating areas, a pergola, and outdoor furniture. The house has a combination of flat and gable roofs, with large windows and sliding doors providing ample natural light. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with wooden accents on the deck and fencing. The property is surrounded by a wooden privacy fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs.
description: A modern two-story house with a double garage, large deck, swimming pool, and multiple outdoor living spaces, finished in light gray and white with wooden accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's depth, the pool area, and the extensive wooden deck with outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large deck, swimming pool, pergola, and multiple seating areas, as well as the full width of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and the continuation of the deck and pool area, with additional trees and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a double garage, a paved driveway, a small porch with steps, and minimalistic modern door design.
